indicator.description: The Hajime Linux IoT botnet list of active P2P IoT peers (IP addresses)
The Hajime Linux IoT botnet list of active P2P IoT peers (IP addresses)

indicator.pattern:
rule DarkComet_Keylogger_File  : RAT   
   {   
   	meta:   
   		author = "Florian Roth"   
   		description = "Looks like a keylogger file created by DarkComet Malware"   
   		date = "25.07.14"   
   		reference = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Neo23x0/Loki/master/signatures/thor-hacktools.yar"   
   		score = 50   
   	strings:   
   		$magic = "::"   
   		$entry = /\n:: [A-Z]/   
   		$timestamp = /\([0-9]?[0-9]:[0-9][0-9]:[0-9][0-9] [AP]M\)/   
   	condition:   
   		($magic at 0) and #entry > 10 and #timestamp > 10   
   }
[user-agent:value = 'Mozilla/4.0 (compatible; MSIE 7.0; Windows NT 5.1; Trident/4.0; .NET4.0C; .NET4.0E; .NET CLR 2.0.50727; .NET CLR 3.0.04506.648; .NET CLR 3.5.21022)']
